content.body: Thanks for kicking off and driving the revamp, helping/cajoling/dragging vendors to the table (and writing!), and running meetings and setting up the drafting sessions! All of that is key for getting this over the finish line, thanks!

Andrew Whalley (Google): PR addressing Google's comments. A couple things we need to verify but most of the comments were actionable as-is, and I've addressed them! https://forge.etsi.org/rep/cyber/stan4cr2/en-304-617/-/merge_requests/56

content.body: Hey folks, in consideration of Dan's departure, the looming deadline, and the hard requirement for us to submit a Word-prepared docx, I would like to propose that we militantly merge all the open PRs today, so that I can start working on the prep for the final document.
we can continue to work here of course
In the meantime, please make me an admin of this group
